title: Join the waitlist
subtitle: Be first in when Season 1 opens. No spam — just your invite and your referral link.

help.email: Where we'll send your Season 1 invite. Must be unique.
help.nickname: Your public handle on the leaderboard. Leave it blank and we'll spin up a unique one for you. Must be unique.
help.referred: The nickname of whoever invited you, so they get the credit.
help.avatar: Pick the character you'll play as.

errors.emailTaken: That email is already on the list.
errors.nicknameTaken: That nickname is taken — try another.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.title: You're on the list!
success.sub: Here's your handle and your personal invite link.
success.earn: Share it — every friend who joins through your link climbs you up the leaderboard.
